disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A long-standing dull headache suddenly escalated over 24 hours to a severe, crushing pressure that ordinary painkillers do not touch
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache — how has it changed?
Is this headache different from the ones you usually get?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a dull headache for months, but yesterday it turned into a crushing pressure that's far worse than anything before, and paracetamol isn't touching it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid onset of loss of the outer halves of vision in both eyes (tunnel vision) over the same day
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the vision loss — which part of your sight is affected?
Is it one eye or both, and which part of your vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both eyes — I've lost the outer edges of my vision, so it's like looking down a tunnel. It came on fast today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Over the past year, complete loss of libido and inability to get an erection
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your sex drive or sexual function over the past year?
Sometimes these problems come with changes in libido — have you had any?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — over the last year I've completely lost interest in sex and I can't get an erection at all. I hadn't linked it to anything.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: That's a bit personal — but yes, things haven't been right in that department for a while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Months of profound fatigue, feeling cold all the time, and skin looking pale
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over recent months?
Any changes in energy, temperature tolerance, or your skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been utterly wiped out for months, I feel cold even in a warm room, and people say I look pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting, no fever, and no neck stiffness
trigger_question_examples: Any vomiting, fever, or a stiff neck?
Does light hurt your eyes, or is your neck stiff?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I'm not being sick, I don't have a fever, and my neck feels fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to move around safely because of the sudden vision loss; has already tripped and fallen at home, and is alone
trigger_question_examples: Are you safe to move around at home right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own and I can't see the sides — I already tripped over the coffee table. I'm too scared to walk to the door.
